managedblockchain.member.memberfabriccon.Description: The password for the member's initial administrative user. The `AdminPassword` must be at least eight characters long and no more than 32 characters. It must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one digit. It cannot have a single quotation mark (‘), a double quotation marks (“), a forward slash(/), a backward slash(), @, or a space.
The user name for the member's initial administrative user.
